channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Oil surges to $100 per barrel. And, Trump imposes a new round of tariffs
item.description: Oil surged to $100 per barrel after Iran-backed Houthi rebels attacked two Saudi tankers in the Red Sea. And, President Trump overnight replaced expir...

item.title: Trump threatens a major escalation in Iran as the war nears the 5-month mark
item.description: The U.S. continued airstrikes in Iran while Tehran launched retaliatory attacks on U.S. targets in the Gulf, as President Trump said he was close to d...

item.title: What animal is the deformed-but-adorable Jimothy? The quiz knows — do you?
item.description: Also: Ryan Gosling's regrets, Zohran Mamdani's exhortations and the Smithsonian's alleged wokeness.

item.title: A former nun explains why she ran away from her 'Cloistered' life
item.description: Catherine Coldstream entered a Carmelite monastery at age 24, and lived a life of prayer and obedience for 12 years. Her memoir is C loistered: My Yea...
